name: Veal Chops Italienne
recipeIngredient: large garlic clove, peeled and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heat-resistant, non-metallic 10-inch skillet, place 2 tablespoons vegetable oil. Add crushed garlic.
2. Heat oil on top of a conventional surface unit until hot.
3. Sear veal chops in hot oil until brown on both sides. Season veal chops to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside.
4. In a medium-size bowl, combine tomato sauce, oregano, sugar, chives, and 2 tablespoons red wine. Blend thoroughly.
5. Pour sauce over veal chops. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 6 minutes.
6. Sprinkle top of chops with 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese and heat an additional 1 minute.
